column1: # Phase B slice DAG. slice <tab> comma-separated deps ("-" = root).
# Checked by scripts/check-phaseb-manifest.py: acyclic, and no slice may be an
# orphan (unreachable from the S19 exit demonstration) unless listed as terminal.
# Round 5 caught S2b as exactly such an orphan: it owned the exit-criterion-fatal
# live-tail requirement, yet nothing depended on it, so S19 could pass without it.
